rationale: Create the first purchase request for an executable partial work package under 1,000,000 to require only department_head approval but keep approval lead time lower than division_head level. This aligns with the objective to reduce avoidable approval lead time under budget consumption pressure.

Create the second purchase request for the remaining executable partial work package also under 1,000,000 to keep approval at department_head level and meet total amount needed. This supports incremental work and faster combined approval lead time.
